scripts.test:html: newman run collections/smoke.postman_collection.json -e collections/env.postman_environment.json -r htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html
scripts.test:ci: newman run collections/smoke.postman_collection.json -e collections/env.postman_environment.json --env-var baseUrl=$BASE_URL -r cli,junit --reporter-junit-export reports/results.xml
